arts.ttl: Arsenal staff think they have a really ‘confident’ youngster who could make debut vs Bolton
Paul Scholes concerned Arsenal aren’t clicking as Man Utd legend makes worrying claim
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's team nearly secured a victory over the reigning champions at the Etihad Stadium on Sunday, despite being reduced to 10 men. However, Manchester United icon Scholes still feels that "it's not quite clicking" for Arsenal and has been unimpressed by the Gunners' attacking prowess in open play.

arts.ttl: Aliko Dangote makes fresh Arsenal takeover statement amid $2bn Stan Kroenke buyout admission
arts.sum: The last time we had this interview I told you as soon as I am finished with the refinery I am going to try and buy Arsenal, but the issue is that everything has gone up and the clubs too are all doing very well, Arsenal is doing extremely well. "It was either finish your project or go and buy Arsenal and I think the best decision was to go and complete the refinery.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer has theory why Man City's Jeremy Doku avoided yellow card against Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester City winger Jeremy Doku appeared to get away with the same offence that saw Arsenal's Leandro Trossard sent off on Sunday, and Alan Shearer claims to know why

arts.ttl: Rodri injury costs Man City 13 points: Arsenal Premier League favourites
arts.sum: Rodri ’s injury for Manchester City has changed the complexion of the Premier League title race dramatically, putting Arsenal in command of the chase for the top-flight crown based on recent history. Rodri injury costs Man City 13 points: Arsenal Premier League favourites

arts.ttl: ‘One of the best signings’: Fabrizio Romano says Arsenal believe ‘fantastic’ player is now worth £60m
arts.sum: Arsenal have made some fantastic signings in recent years. Martin Odegaard was an absolute bargain at £30m, William Saliba was an incredible buy at just...

arts.ttl: ‘No’: Pep Guardiola slams media after what he’s just been asked about Arsenal after Sunday’s draw
Report: What Arsenal players have been saying privately about how referees treat Man City
Jamie Carragher explains the Jose Mourinho tactic Arsenal are using amid ‘cheating’ allegations
arts.sum: Arsenal have been heavily criticised for their approach in the second half against Manchester City on Sunday - and Jamie Carragher thinks they are using the Jose Mourinho playbook

arts.ttl: Arsenal could make Premier League title-winning deal in January by signing £66m striker who Mikel Arteta loves - opinion
